channel.title: Events on ftvkyo
channel.description: Recent content in Events on ftvkyo

item.title: Making a "Known Error" app for Tildagon
item.description: At the end of May 2024, I went to my first EMF Camp, and I loved it. It had many interesting things to see and cool people to meet. I wouldn’t say I made new friends there, but I did get closer to members of Edinburgh Hacklab which I am also a member of. This post is not about EMF Camp though, it is about one of its highlights: the Tildagon badge.
